modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: BluRay player not responding to touch panel or XPanel controls

full_description_text: So, the BluRay player in the classroom isn’t working right. Like, when you try to use the touch panel or the XPanel app, nothing happens. The buttons for the DVD control just don’t do anything at all. It’s super frustrating because you can’t control the player like you’re supposed to!
short_description: BluRay player not responding to touch panel or XPanel controls
description: So, the BluRay player in the classroom isn’t working right. Like, when you try to use the touch panel or the XPanel app, nothing happens. The buttons for the DVD control just don’t do anything at all. It’s super frustrating because you can’t control the player like you’re supposed to!
